import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
import numpy as np

# Path to the original wp5-eval-main run
run_dir = Path\("results/runs/20260228-093733_seed1_wp5-eval-main_3e8eacc/curves"\)

# Load all ppo_aware files following analyze_actions.py exactly
frames = []
for seed in range\(1, 21\):
    csv_path = run_dir / f"seed{seed}_ppo_aware_test.csv"
    if csv_path.exists\(\):
        df = pd.read_csv\(csv_path\)
        df["seed"] = seed
        df["strategy"] = "ppo_aware"
        frames.append\(df\)

df = pd.concat\(frames, ignore_index=True\)

# Clean according to analyze_actions._clean\(\)
df = df[df["regime_hat"].isin\(["L", "M", "H"]\)].copy\(\)
df = df.dropna\(subset=["h", "m"]\)

# _seed_level_stats\(\) - group by seed, strategy, regime_hat
def _seed_level_stats\(df\):
    g = df.groupby\(["seed", "strategy", "regime_hat"], as_index=False\)
    out = g.agg\(
        mean_h=\("h", "mean"\),
        mean_m=\("m", "mean"\),
        ph5=\("h", lambda x: float\(\(x == 5\).mean\(\)\)\),
    \)
    return out

df_seed = _seed_level_stats\(df\)

# print_table logic - group by strategy and regime, aggregate mean_h/std_h
print\("Seed-level aggregation \(mean_h per seed in regime L\):"\)
print\(\)
ppo_aware_L = df_seed[\(df_seed["strategy"] == "ppo_aware"\) & \(df_seed["regime_hat"] == "L"\)]
for _, row in ppo_aware_L.iterrows\(\):
    print\(f"  Seed {int\(row['seed']\):2d}: mean_h = {row['mean_h']:.4f}"\)

print\(\)
rows = []
for \(strat, reg\), g in df_seed.groupby\(["strategy", "regime_hat"]\):
    if strat == "ppo_aware" and reg == "L":
        mean_h_value = g["mean_h"].mean\(\)
        std_h_value = g["mean_h"].std\(\)
        rows.append\({
            "strategy": strat,
            "regime": reg,
            "mean_h": mean_h_value,
            "std_h": std_h_value,
            "mean_m": g["mean_m"].mean\(\),
            "std_m": g["mean_m"].std\(\),
            "P\(h=5\)": g["ph5"].mean\(\),
            "std_ph5": g["ph5"].std\(\),
        }\)

tbl = pd.DataFrame\(rows\)
print\("Final Table 4 result for ppo_aware, regime L:"\)
print\(\)
print\(f"mean_h:  {tbl.loc[0, 'mean_h']:.2f} ± {tbl.loc[0, 'std_h']:.2f}"\)
print\(\)
print\("Full table entry:"\)
print\(tbl.to_string\(index=False\)\)

EOFPYTHON)

import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

# Compute the full table for all strategies for context
run_dir = Path\("results/runs/20260228-093733_seed1_wp5-eval-main_3e8eacc/curves"\)

# Load all files
frames = []
for seed in range\(1, 21\):
    for strategy in ["AS", "naive", "ppo_aware", "ppo_blind"]:
        csv_path = run_dir / f"seed{seed}_{strategy}_test.csv"
        if csv_path.exists\(\):
            df = pd.read_csv\(csv_path\)
            df["seed"] = seed
            df["strategy"] = strategy
            frames.append\(df\)

df = pd.concat\(frames, ignore_index=True\)

# Clean
df = df[df["regime_hat"].isin\(["L", "M", "H"]\)].copy\(\)
df = df.dropna\(subset=["h", "m"]\)

# Seed-level stats
def _seed_level_stats\(df\):
    g = df.groupby\(["seed", "strategy", "regime_hat"], as_index=False\)
    out = g.agg\(
        mean_h=\("h", "mean"\),
        mean_m=\("m", "mean"\),
        ph5=\("h", lambda x: float\(\(x == 5\).mean\(\)\)\),
    \)
    return out

df_seed = _seed_level_stats\(df\)

# Compute table
rows = []
for \(strat, reg\), g in df_seed.groupby\(["strategy", "regime_hat"]\):
    rows.append\({
        "strategy": strat,
        "regime": reg,
        "mean_h": g["mean_h"].mean\(\),
        "std_h": g["mean_h"].std\(\),
        "mean_m": g["mean_m"].mean\(\),
        "std_m": g["mean_m"].std\(\),
        "P\(h=5\)": g["ph5"].mean\(\),
        "std_ph5": g["ph5"].std\(\),
    }\)

tbl = pd.DataFrame\(rows\)

# Filter for regime L only
print\("TABLE 4 - Action Statistics by Regime L"\)
print\("="*80\)
print\(tbl[tbl["regime"] == "L"].to_string\(index=False\)\)

Bash(/c/venvs/thesis-env/.venv/Scripts/python << 'EOFPYTHON'
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

print\("="*80\)
print\("VERIFICATION REPORT: Table 4 Data"\)
print\("="*80\)
print\(\)

# Path to the original wp5-eval-main run
run_dir = Path\("results/runs/20260228-093733_seed1_wp5-eval-main_3e8eacc/curves"\)
print\(f"Source run: {run_dir.parent.name}"\)
print\(f"Total seeds: 20 \(seeds 1-20\)"\)
print\(f"Strategies: AS, naive, ppo_aware, ppo_blind"\)
print\(\)

# Load all files
frames = []
for seed in range\(1, 21\):
    for strategy in ["AS", "naive", "ppo_aware", "ppo_blind"]:
        csv_path = run_dir / f"seed{seed}_{strategy}_test.csv"
        if csv_path.exists\(\):
            df = pd.read_csv\(csv_path\)
            df["seed"] = seed
            df["strategy"] = strategy
            frames.append\(df\)

df = pd.concat\(frames, ignore_index=True\)
print\(f"Total rows loaded: {len\(df\)}"\)

# Clean
df = df[df["regime_hat"].isin\(["L", "M", "H"]\)].copy\(\)
df = df.dropna\(subset=["h", "m"]\)
print\(f"Rows after cleaning \(valid regime_hat and h/m\): {len\(df\)}"\)
print\(\)

# Seed-level stats
def _seed_level_stats\(df\):
    g = df.groupby\(["seed", "strategy", "regime_hat"], as_index=False\)
    out = g.agg\(
        mean_h=\("h", "mean"\),
        mean_m=\("m", "mean"\),
        ph5=\("h", lambda x: float\(\(x == 5\).mean\(\)\)\),
    \)
    return out

df_seed = _seed_level_stats\(df\)

# Compute table
rows = []
for \(strat, reg\), g in df_seed.groupby\(["strategy", "regime_hat"]\):
    rows.append\({
        "strategy": strat,
        "regime": reg,
        "mean_h": g["mean_h"].mean\(\),
        "std_h": g["mean_h"].std\(\),
        "mean_m": g["mean_m"].mean\(\),
        "std_m": g["mean_m"].std\(\),
        "P\(h=5\)": g["ph5"].mean\(\),
        "std_ph5": g["ph5"].std\(\),
    }\)

tbl = pd.DataFrame\(rows\)

# Focus on ppo_aware, regime L
ppo_aware_L = tbl[\(tbl["strategy"] == "ppo_aware"\) & \(tbl["regime"] == "L"\)]

print\("THESIS TABLE 4 CLAIM:"\)
print\("  ppo_aware, regime L, average h = 1.43"\)
print\(\)
print\("COMPUTED VALUE:"\)
mean_h_value = ppo_aware_L["mean_h"].values[0]
std_h_value = ppo_aware_L["std_h"].values[0]
print\(f"  mean_h = {mean_h_value:.2f} ± {std_h_value:.2f}"\)
print\(\)

# Check if they match
rounded_mean = round\(mean_h_value, 2\)
print\("VERIFICATION:"\)
if rounded_mean == 1.43:
    print\(f"  ✓ MATCH! Rounded value: {rounded_mean}"\)
else:
    print\(f"  Rounded value: {rounded_mean}"\)

print\(\)
print\("DETAILED BREAKDOWN \(All Regime L\):"\)
print\("-"*80\)
print\(tbl[tbl["regime"] == "L"][["strategy", "mean_h", "std_h"]].to_string\(index=False\)\)

            df["strategy"] = strategy
            frames.append\(df\)

# Clean
df = df[df["regime_hat"].isin\(["L", "M", "H"]\)].copy\(\)
df = df.dropna\(subset=["h", "m"]\)

# Seed-level stats
def _seed_level_stats\(df\):
    g = df.groupby\(["seed", "strategy", "regime_hat"], as_index=False\)
    out = g.agg\(
        mean_h=\("h", "mean"\),

    \)

for \(strat, reg\), g in df_seed.groupby\(["strategy", "regime_hat"]\):

        "regime": reg,
        "mean_h": g["mean_h"].mean\(\),
